data.title: 国际服主线关卡开放：Area18
data.summary: [New Mission Available Notice] Check out Mission Area 18 in the 11/8 (Tue) update. Acquire Advanced
data.body:
[New Mission Available Notice]

Check out Mission Area 18 in the 11/8 (Tue) update.
Acquire Advanced Skill Growth Materials in Normal Missions, and Shimiko, Ayane and Aru's Elephs in Hard Missions!
